overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia exploring a deserted medieval village at night. The character walks through wooden structures illuminated by warm lanterns, discovers a hanged person suspended from a large oak tree, and continues past corpses lying on the ground, creating a dark, ominous atmosphere with contrasting teal night skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered village walkway with wooden market structures

events.description: exits covered wooden walkway into open village area with visible night sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village examining wooden structures and lantern-lit pathways

entered.detail: wooden roof and support beams creating a covered passage over the path
stacked stone wall with wooden support posts
warm yellow lantern hanging from wooden post casting orange light
traditional village cottage with thatched roof illuminated from within
stacked wooden barrels beside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered wooden walkway with stone walls and warm lantern lighting. Geralt walks forward through the medieval village, passing wooden barrels and traditional thatched cottages. Around the 10-second mark, the covered structure ends and the scene opens to reveal the teal night sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square with large oak tree and gallows

events.description: discovers a hanged person suspended from the large oak tree branch
character turns around and walks toward a wooden door before turning back

agents.ego_description: approaching the large tree to examine the hanged person, walking around the trunk for closer inspection

notable_agents.action: hanged person suspended from oak tree branch, body swaying slightly in the wind

entered.detail: massive ancient oak tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches dominating the village square
simple wooden bench at the base of the oak tree
small wooden structure with closed door and warm interior light
dark teal-green night sky visible through the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide village square dominated by a massive oak tree against a teal night sky. Geralt discovers a hanged person suspended from the tree and walks around to examine the body. The character briefly turns toward a nearby wooden door before continuing, with warm lantern light contrasting against the cool moonlit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark village outskirts transitioning to forest edge

events.description: discovers multiple dead bodies lying on the ground beside the path

agents.ego_description: walking away from the village square through darker areas, passing corpses on the ground while heading toward the forest edge

entered.detail: dead body lying face down on the dirt path in tattered clothing
another dead body lying further along the path
dense dark trees forming the forest edge beyond the village boundary

segments.scene_description: Leaving the oak tree behind, Geralt walks through darker outskirts of the village where the lighting becomes dimmer. The path leads toward a dense forest edge, and around 45 seconds, dead bodies are discovered lying on the ground beside the trail, suggesting a recent attack or massacre in the abandoned settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sheltered medieval village that gradually opens into a grim, moonlit landscape of death. It begins within a covered wooden walkway where warm lantern light illuminates stone walls and thatched cottages as Geralt walks forward. As the covered structure ends, the scene expands into a wide village square under a stark teal night sky, centering on a massive oak tree from which a hanged person is suspended. The camera then follows Geralt as he leaves the tree and the contrasting lantern light behind, moving into the dimmer outskirts of the settlement. Finally, the path leads toward a dense forest edge where the environment grows increasingly dark, revealing dead bodies strewn across the ground beside the trail.
